# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- A concise description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Related issue(s)

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavioural change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `build` / `ci` — tooling
- [ ] `chore` — other
- [ ] Breaking change (`!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## Conventional Commits

- [ ] PR title and commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify these changes? Include commands run, manual scenarios, etc. -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after screenshots or a short recording. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `deno fmt` and `deno lint` pass.
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` pass for `src-tauri`.
- [ ] `deno task check` passes.
- [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable.
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable.
- [ ] I understand `CHANGELOG.md` is managed by Release Please and have not edited it manually.
